# Pull Request

## Summary
<!-- 1-3 bullet points describing the change -->

## Type
<!-- Check one -->
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore

## Bug Fix Checklist (if applicable)
- [ ] Symptom described with reproduction steps
- [ ] Root cause identified (file:line)
- [ ] Fix targets the identified root cause
- [ ] Regression test added

## Testing
- [ ] Backend tests pass (`cd backend-ts && npm test`)
- [ ] Frontend tests pass (`cd frontend && npm test`)
- [ ] Manual verification done
- [ ] No console.log statements added

## Deploy Notes
<!-- Any special deploy steps? Database migration? Config change? -->
None
